tests.name: Live additive-load replay candidates are being probed on the runtime bundle surface
tests.details: Unsafe live replay calls are intentionally disabled in the sampler right now because zero-arg probing of upload/accept methods can trip PendingWorldUpload assertions. The replay path is still tracked as a binary/runtime lead, just not invoked blindly.

Current blocker: expected prefab fields exist, but they are still resolving as placeholder-style UObject userdata wrappers instead of decoded brick/prefab values.

tests.name: The server-side runtime surface for future headless prefab replay is present
tests.details: Sampler verified; additive prefab load recorded; BRWorldManager and BRBundleArchive are both live; native call probes are running. This is a replay target surface, not proof of automatic headless replay yet.
